title: Calculate Multiple Dates from a Number

posts.author: tigger2000ttfn (Michael )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there another help request. Is there a way to setup a formula to spit out all the dates from a timeline. I would like to calculate a start date and each date in between to spit out to a column and stop when it gets to the end date of a timeline. Right now I have to manually input the dates inbetween.

Screen Shot 2023-03-26 at 8.13.13 PM1544×278 20.3 KB
